MahjongRules.Rule1: Mahjong Ways is a 5-reel, 4-row video slot featuring Wild symbol transformation and free spins with increasing multiplier.

Rule2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
Rule2.comment: Both %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced by the currency symbol, do not translate. Both %{minChip} and %{maxChip} will be replaced by multiplier, do not translate.
Rule2.example: TThe game is played with 20 base bet for %{1024} ways (fixed), bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.1 to 8.

MahjongRules.Rule3: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
MahjongRules.Rule4: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
MahjongRules.Rule5: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

MahjongFeatures.GoldPlatedExplain1: During any spins, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3 and/or 4 may appear in gold.
MahjongFeatures.GoldPlatedExplain2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold plated symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol(s).
MahjongFeatures.FreeSpinExplain1: 3 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
MahjongFeatures.FreeSpinExplain2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers above the reels will be increased to x2, x4, x6 and x10 respectively.

MahjongCommonRule.WildExplanation1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
MahjongCommonRule.WildExplanation2: Gold Plated symbols appears on reels 2, 3 and 4 only.

MahjongMultiplier.MultiplierExplain1: During any spins, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown above the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
MahjongMultiplier.MultiplierExplain2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
MahjongMultiplier.MultiplierExplain3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
MahjongMultiplier.MultiplierExplain4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.
